description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human head with pronounced facial features, including closed eyes and a prominent nose, carved from a dark wood. The head is adorned with an elaborate headdress that curves upward and backward, featuring intricate detailing and geometric elements. The sculpture is mounted on a square wooden base, which itself rests on a circular wooden platform, providing stability and visual contrast. The wood grain and coloration vary across the surface, giving the piece a rich, organic texture. The back of the headdress shows additional carved details, suggesting hair or ornamental patterns. The overall form is both angular and flowing, blending traditional and abstract artistic influences.
description: A dark wooden sculpture of a stylized human head with an elaborate, upward-curving headdress, mounted on a square base atop a circular platform. The piece features intricate carvings and rich wood grain textures.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face with closed eyes, prominent nose, and the full headdress rising above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face and the dramatic curve of the headdress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress with carved details and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and the headdress's curvature, mirroring the left side.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human head with elaborate headdress
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture is shown isolated on a neutral background.
